site.name: GuedesLab
site.description: Research lab led by Dr. Herbert Guedes. Immunology, cancer immunotherapy and applications of biotechnology in health. INCA · FIOCRUZ.

hero.title: The Lab
hero.body_1: Led by Dr. Herbert Guedes, GuedesLab focuses primarily on studies in immunology, cancer immunotherapy and applications of biotechnology in health.
hero.body_2: Our projects are linked to INCA and FIOCRUZ. At INCA, we operate in the Cellular and Gene Immunotherapy Laboratory / Cell and Gene Therapy Program / Research Coordination. At FIOCRUZ, we participate in the FioCâncer program across its scientific and educational initiatives.

section.description: Four complementary fronts — from bench to clinic — affiliated with INCA and FIOCRUZ.

items.title: Cellular Immunotherapy
items.description: T-cell engineering (CAR-T) and adoptive therapy strategies targeting solid and hematological tumors.

items.title: Gene Therapy
items.description: Lentiviral vectors, gene editing and transfer platforms for translational applications.

items.title: Tumor Immunology
items.description: Characterization of the tumor microenvironment and immune escape mechanisms in pre-clinical models.

items.title: Health Biotechnology
items.description: Development of biotech platforms with translation potential for public-health systems.

section.description: Lean structure with researchers, postdocs, graduate students and undergraduates.
Mentoring in graduate programs and undergraduate research.

items.title: Graduate · Oncology
items.description: Master's and PhD mentoring at the Oncology Graduate Program.

items.title: Graduate · Cellular & Molecular Biology
items.description: PGBCM mentoring with a focus on immunotherapy and translational biotech.

items.title: Undergraduate Research
items.description: Occasional openings for undergraduates interested in experimental immunology.

section.description_prefix: Interested in internships, undergraduate research or proposing a collaboration? Email us at
